gate_BC_live_shape.method: live-packed options via learned_selector_bridge + compact_semantic_action_key bridge (AD compact key, 95.5% table-key match); NO caller-supplied transplant support; runtime resolves support from its OWN exported table by canonical FAMILY||compact key.

compact_key_bridge: agent/starmie_heuristics._attach_compact_keys attaches compact_semantic_action_key (option identity, not a support value) so the repaired runtime derives the canonical transplant_lookup_key. The portable PACKER does not emit it; ideally Model A emits it natively for a self-contained bundle.
